_comment: A/B VARIANT (2026-06-28) — NOT deployed. Identical to portfolio.json EXCEPT buy_p 0.70->0.78, to test skipping the weak 0.70-0.78 favorites (motivated by the eth 0.70-0.85 band running cold). Backtest on 281 clean markets: same total return (+29.6%) as 0.70 but higher win-rate (88.5% vs 84.9%) and more balanced halves (less variance) — a marginal consistency gain, NOT a return gain. The LIVE bot keeps portfolio.json (buy_p=0.70); this file is for offline/paper comparison only.
